title: ExportManager Object
description: Provides support for exporting model data to various formats.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: createC3MFExportOptions
methods.description: Creates a C3MFExportOptions object that's used to export a design in 3MF format. Creation of the C3MFExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export.

methods.name: createDXFFlatPatternExportOptions
methods.description: Creates a DXFFlatPatternExport object that's used to export a flat pattern in DXF format. Creation of the DXFFlatPatternExport object does not perform the export. You must call the execute method. You can change any additional settings by setting properties on the returned object before calling the execute method.

methods.name: createDXFSketchExportOptions
methods.description: Creates a DXFSketchExportOptions object that's used to export a sketch in DXF format. Creation of the DXFSketchExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must call the execute method after changing the settings to the desired values.

methods.name: createFusionArchiveExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an FusionArchiveExportOptions object that's used to export a design in Fusion archive format. Creation of the FusionArchiveExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The FusionArchiveExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to Fusion archive format.

methods.name: createIGESExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an IGESExportOptions object that's used to export a design in IGES format. Creation of the IGESExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The IGESExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to IGES format.

methods.name: createOBJExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an OBJExportOptions object that's used to export a design in OBJ format. Creation of the OBJExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export.

methods.name: createSATExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an SATExportOptions object that's used to export a design in SAT format. Creation of the SATExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The SATExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to SAT format.

methods.name: createSMTExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an SMTExportOptions object that's used to export a design in SMT format. Creation of the SMTExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The SMTExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to SMT format.

methods.name: createSTEPExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an STEPExportOptions object that's used to export a design in STEP format. Creation of the STEPExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The STEPExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to STEP format.

methods.name: createSTLExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an STLExportOptions object that's used to export a design in STL format. Creation of the STLExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export.

methods.name: createUSDExportOptions
methods.description: Creates an USDExportOptions object that's used to export a design in USD format. Creation of the USDExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The USDExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to USD format.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes the export operation to create the file in the format specified by the provided ExportOptions object.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

related_samples.name: ExportManager API Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates how to export f3d to different formats.

related_samples.name: Export to other formats API Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates exporting the active design to IGES, STEP, SAT, SMT, F3D and STL formats. To run this sample, have a design open and run the script. It will write out the translated files to a temp directory, which will it show in a message box.

related_samples.name: Set parameters from a csv file and export to STEP
related_samples.description: Reads data from a .csv file and sets user parameters in the model and then exports the model to STEP. When setting parameters be aware that this sample is setting user parameters. It's also possible to set model parameters but that's not demonstrated here. Also when accessing parameters, it is case sensitive so the names you use in your program much exactly match the names in the model.

related_samples.name: STLExport API Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates how to export f3d to STL format.

classType.title: ExportManager.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

createC3MFExportOptions.title: ExportManager.createC3MFExportOptions Method
createC3MFExportOptions.description: Creates a C3MFExportOptions object that's used to export a design in 3MF format. Creation of the C3MFExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export.

syntax.python:
# Uses no optional arguments.
returnValue = exportManager_var.createC3MFExportOptions(geometry)

# Uses optional arguments.
returnValue = exportManager_var.createC3MFExportOptions(geometry, filename)

createC3MFExportOptions.return_description: The created createC3MFExportOptions object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: The geometry to export. This can be a BRepBody, Occurrence, or Component object.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename of the 3MF file to be created. This is optional and can be left out if the mesh will be opened in a mesh editor.   This is an optional argument whose default value is "".

createDXFFlatPatternExportOptions.title: ExportManager.createDXFFlatPatternExportOptions Method
createDXFFlatPatternExportOptions.description: Creates a DXFFlatPatternExport object that's used to export a flat pattern in DXF format. Creation of the DXFFlatPatternExport object does not perform the export. You must call the execute method. You can change any additional settings by setting properties on the returned object before calling the execute method.
createDXFFlatPatternExportOptions.return_description: The created DXFFlatPatternExport object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename of the DXF file to be created.

parameters.name: flatPattern
parameters.description: The FlatPattern object to export.

createDXFSketchExportOptions.title: ExportManager.createDXFSketchExportOptions Method
createDXFSketchExportOptions.description: Creates a DXFSketchExportOptions object that's used to export a sketch in DXF format. Creation of the DXFSketchExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must call the execute method after changing the settings to the desired values.
createDXFSketchExportOptions.return_description: The created DXFSketchExportOptions object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename of the DXF file to be created.

parameters.name: sketch
parameters.description: The Sketch object to export.

createFusionArchiveExportOptions.title: ExportManager.createFusionArchiveExportOptions Method
createFusionArchiveExportOptions.description: Creates an FusionArchiveExportOptions object that's used to export a design in Fusion archive format. Creation of the FusionArchiveExportOptions object does not perform the export. You must pass this object to the ExportManager.execute method to perform the export. The FusionArchiveExportOptions supports any available options when exporting to Fusion archive format.

syntax.python:
# Uses no optional arguments.
returnValue = exportManager_var.createFusionArchiveExportOptions(filename)

# Uses optional arguments.
returnValue = exportManager_var.createFusionArchiveExportOptions(filename, geometry)

createFusionArchiveExportOptions.return_description: The created FusionArchiveExportOptions object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename of the Fusion archive file to be created.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: The geometry to export. Valid geometry for this is currently a Component object. This argument is optional and if not specified, it results in the root component and it entire contents being exported.   This is an optional argument whose default value is null.

related_samples.description: Demonstrates how to export f3d to different formats.

related_samples.description: Demonstrates exporting the active design to IGES, STEP, SAT, SMT, F3D and STL formats. To run this sample, have a design open and run the script. It will write out the translated files to a temp directory, which will it show in a message box.

execute.title: ExportManager.execute Method
execute.description: Executes the export operation to create the file in the format specified by the provided ExportOptions object.
execute.return_description: Returns true if the export was successful.

parameters.name: exportOptions
parameters.description: An ExportOptions object that is created using one of the create methods on the ExportManager object. This defines the type of file and any available options supported for that file type.
